news:news.news:title: Spain has closed its airspace to US aircraft involved in the Iran war, following a denial of military base access to the US.
news:news.news:keywords: geopolitical tensions in Europe, Israeli law on death penalty, US military operations in Iran, cultural recognition in Australia, refugee policies in Germany

news:news.news:title: Brent crude oil prices surged to $116 a barrel amid escalating tensions in the Middle East, while US stock markets continued to decline for the fifth consecutive week.
news:news.news:keywords: oil price surge due to Middle East tensions, impact of US-Iran conflict on markets, Air Canada CEO resignation news, minimum wage increase campaigns in US, challenges for US border businesses

news:news.news:title: Rec Room, a competitor to Roblox, is shutting down despite having over 150 million users and a peak valuation of $3.5 billion.
news:news.news:keywords: Rec Room shutdown news, Amazon Big Spring Sale highlights, new smart lock technology, advancements in packaging, interoperable video calls between iPhone and Android

news:news.news:title: The Final Four for Women's March Madness is set with Texas and South Carolina advancing, while the NBA sees significant player developments and challenges in officiating.
news:news.news:keywords: Women's March Madness updates, NBA player controversies, MLB officiating challenges

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into sleep's impact on health, the effectiveness of non-drug therapies for arthritis, and new cosmic phenomena.
news:news.news:keywords: sleep and muscle growth, non-drug treatments for arthritis, cosmic explosions and physics, supermassive black holes, Big Bang theories

news:news.news:title: The ongoing conflict in Iran continues to escalate, impacting regional stability and prompting various international responses.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East conflict updates, international political developments, economic responses to fuel prices, protests against political leaders, cultural theft and art crime

news:news.news:title: US churches are increasingly developing affordable housing on underutilized land as border businesses suffer from reduced Canadian tourism amid rising oil prices and economic challenges.
news:news.news:keywords: affordable housing initiatives, impact of political tensions on businesses, oil price fluctuations due to geopolitical events

news:news.news:title: AI continues to influence various sectors, including music and social media, while ongoing sales events highlight consumer technology trends.
news:news.news:keywords: AI in music industry, Bluesky AI feed customization, Amazon Big Spring Sale highlights, historical impact of Macintosh, Apple App Store antitrust issues

news:news.news:title: UConn's dramatic last-second victory over Duke secured their place in the Final Four, while the NFL faces challenges with referee negotiations and player trades.
news:news.news:keywords: UConn's Elite Eight victory analysis, Final Four predictions, NFL referee negotiations, Rick Pitino's new coaching deal, Gary Woodland's comeback win

news:news.news:title: New research reveals potential health risks of erythritol, while breakthroughs in pain therapy and human origins reshape scientific understanding.
news:news.news:keywords: health risks of sugar substitutes, quantum computing breakthroughs, pain management without opioids, new cholesterol guidelines, human evolution discoveries

news:news.news:title: Spain Closes Airspace to US Planes as Brent Oil Hits $116 Amid Middle East Tensions
UConn Shocks Duke with Last-Second Win, Secures Final Four Spot Amid Rising Oil Prices
